docs.title: Python Harmony Documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the Python Harmony project documentation.

docs.title: Contents
docs.text:
• Nodes Attributes - Complete reference of all Toon Boom Harmony node types and their attributes

  • Nodes Types - Reference of all node types

  • Actions - All the actions and responder avalaible in Harmony

This documentation is automatically created from Harmony 25.1

docs.title: Actions
docs.text:
You'll find all the information about Harmony actions organized by responder.

GUI Interaction

Actions are GUI commands that can be triggered through Harmony's interface.

They correspond to menu items, toolbar buttons, and keyboard shortcuts.
